subcodes.first_line: O my Lord, my Hope, my utmost Desire, my Refuge, my Haven, my Destination and my Shelter! With a heart full of supplication, I beseech Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: رب و رجائی و غایه منائی و ملجای و ملاذی و مرجعی و معاذی انی اتضرع الیک بقلب
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
